description: Overcrowding reported at Food Court East. Capacity at 97%. Fans unable to enter.
ai_classification: CROWD_SURGE — HIGH severity. Zone density critical. Recommend immediate access restriction and crowd redirection to Food Court West.
ai_recommendation: 1. Deploy 3 crowd control volunteers at zone entry. 2. Display digital signs redirecting fans to Food Court West. 3. Alert organizer for real-time monitoring. 4. Open secondary food service point if available.

description: Exit Corridor North is near full capacity. Risk of dangerous compression.
ai_classification: CROWD_SURGE — CRITICAL. Exit corridor approaching crush density. Immediate intervention required.
ai_recommendation: 1. Immediately open Exit Corridor South as overflow. 2. Station 2 security officers at North corridor entrance to regulate flow. 3. Broadcast PA announcement directing fans to South exit. 4. Consider temporary hold on lower bowl exit if surge continues.

description: Fan reported fainting near Section 112. Medical team requested.
ai_classification: MEDICAL — MEDIUM severity. Fan medical emergency, non-life-threatening.
ai_recommendation: 1. Medical volunteer should reach scene within 3 minutes. 2. Clear 2m radius around patient. 3. If no improvement in 5 min, escalate to emergency services. 4. Document for post-match medical report.

description: Two individuals attempting to access the pitch without accreditation.
Concourse Ring showing elevated density. Flow restricted near stairwell B.
ai_classification: CROWD_SURGE — MEDIUM. Elevated concourse density. Monitor and redirect.
ai_recommendation: 1. Deploy wayfinding volunteer to stairwell B. 2. Direct fans to stairwell A as alternate route. 3. Monitor density every 5 minutes. 4. If density exceeds 90%, escalate to HIGH.
notes: Volunteer dispatched to stairwell B at 20:13

description: Child separated from family. Brought to information booth, family reunited.
ai_recommendation: Standard lost-person protocol completed. No further action required.

description: Altercation between fans from opposing supporter groups. De-escalated by security.
ai_classification: FIGHT — MEDIUM severity. Fan altercation, resolved.
ai_recommendation: Separate fan groups. Document individuals involved. Issue formal warning. Flag for stadium ban review.

description: Unattended bag reported near Food Village kiosk 4. Area being cleared.
ai_classification: SUSPICIOUS_ITEM — HIGH severity. Treat as credible until cleared.
ai_recommendation: 1. Maintain 20m exclusion zone. 2. Evacuate immediate area (kiosks 1–6). 3. Contact venue security coordinator immediately. 4. Do NOT approach or move the item. 5. Document exact location and time.

description: Elderly fan in cardiac distress. Emergency services called. AED deployed.
ai_classification: MEDICAL — HIGH severity. Cardiac event. Emergency services en route.
ai_recommendation: 1. Continue AED and CPR if required. 2. Keep area clear for paramedic access. 3. Designate clear path from Gate A for ambulance. 4. Assign volunteer to guide paramedics from gate to Medical Bay A.

description: Reports of obscene chanting from a section of fans in North Concourse. Monitoring.
